# AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships

**Object**

The relationships you include in the request and those on which you can operate.

## Declaration

```swift
object AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships
```

## Dictionaries

- **AccessibilityDeclarationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.App**: The data structure that represents the relationship to an app for the accessibility declaration create request resource.
